title: lithocardium calophyllum
intro: Lithocardium calophyllum, also known as Calophyllum inophyllum, is a tropical tree native to the coastal regions of the Indian and Pacific Oceans. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocardium calophyllum include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including capsules, teas, and topical creams, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects on human health.
